description: A designed graphic formatted as a clean reproduction of a Blaze Media online news article, on a cream background. At the top is the black 'Blaze media' logo with its flame mark. Below it is the article's photo: Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer seated at a table speaking into a microphone, wearing glasses and a cream blazer, with the U.S. flag and an agency/Treasury flag behind her and a name placard in front; the photo credit reads 'Photo by Anna Moneymaker/Getty Images'. A red section label 'POLITICS' sits beneath, followed by the large black serif headline 'Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown'. The technique is third-party credibility borrowing -- packaging a friendly outlet's headline as a shareable card to promote DOL's 'Project Firewall' H-1B enforcement initiative as tough and unprecedented. Target audience is the public and the administration's base supportive of restricting foreign-worker visas.
notable_text: Blaze media; POLITICS; Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown
